cc:Work.dc:title: Elvie #115
cc:Work.dc:description:
[Panel 1: Elvie is sitting in front of her computer, with the screen showing a page for 'WikipedAI'] Elvie: I've trained an AI model on the complete content of Wikipedia…
[Panel 2] Elvie: It still generates a lot of fake statements… …but at least it adds "[Citation needed]" next to each of them!

text.tspan: Tell me about the cartoon character, 'Elvie'
• She is afraid of ducks and accented letters
• Due to a lab accident with a radioactive flamingo,
• She has developed self-awareness, and is capable
of passing the Turing test, on a good day
